Title: Start Application and Access Distributor List
Preconditions: The application is installed and accessible.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the distributor list page.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The distributor list page is displayed.

Title: Add Vehicle When User Is Registered
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Select and add the vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The vehicle is added to the dataset.

Title: Add Vehicle When User Is Not Registered
Preconditions: User is not registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Check if the user is registered.
4. Navigate to the distributor list page.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is redirected to the distributor list page.

Title: Manually Insert Vehicle When Not Found in Dataset
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Since the vehicle is not found, manually insert the vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The vehicle is manually inserted into the dataset.

Title: View Other Diagrams from Main Distributor Page
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Access Main Distributor Page".
3. Click on "View Other Diagrams".
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is navigated to view other diagrams.

Title: Display Distributor List from Main Distributor Page
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Access Main Distributor Page".
3. Click on "Display Distributor List".
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The distributor list is displayed.

Title: Access Statistics Page from Main Distributor Page
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Access Main Distributor Page".
3. Click on "Access Statistics Page".
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is navigated to the statistics page.

Title: Modify Configuration Parameters
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Access Main Distributor Page".
3. Click on "Display Configuration Parameters".
4. Click on "Modify Configuration Parameters".
5. Save the modified parameters.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The configuration parameters are modified and saved.

Title: No Changes to Display After Validation
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Access Settings Page".
3. Validate the settings.
4. Check if there are any changes to display.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- A popup indicating "Settings Applied" is displayed.

Title: Negative Scenario - Invalid User Registration
Preconditions: User is not registered.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Check if the user is registered.
4. Navigate to the distributor list page.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is redirected to the distributor list page due to invalid registration.

Title: Negative Scenario - Vehicle Not Found in Dataset
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Since the vehicle is not found, manually insert the vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is prompted to manually insert the vehicle due to non-existence in the dataset.

Title: Edge Case - Multiple Vehicles Exist
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Check if there is another vehicle.
Expected Result:
- The application starts successfully.
- The user is prompted to check for other vehicles if they exist.

Title: Edge Case - No More Vehicles Exist
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Click on "Add Vehicle".
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Check if there is another vehicle.
Expected Result:

- The user is informed that no more vehicles exist.
